hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q '^git commit' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: A git commit was just made. Check if this commit completes any task in 0-phase-plan.md (in the spec.inkwell.ai repo). If so, update the corresponding checkbox from [ ] to [x]. Read the file first to see current progress."}}' || true
